description: Final comprehensive provenance figure showing GO annotation data flow, decision table, evidence weights, and verdict for LPL1 GO:0047372 assessment
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig = plt.figure(figsize=(18, 14))
fig.suptitle('Final Provenance Summary: LPL1 (Q5AMS2) GO:0047372 Assessment', 
             fontsize=15, fontweight='bold', y=0.98)

# Layout: 2x2 grid
gs = fig.add_gridspec(2, 2, hspace=0.35, wspace=0.3)

# ============================================================
# Panel A: GO Annotation Provenance Flow
# ============================================================
ax1 = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 0])
ax1.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax1.axis('off')
ax1.set_title('A. GO Annotation Provenance & Data Flow', fontweight='bold', fontsize=11)

# PAINT tree (source)
ax1.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0.5, 8), 3, 1.2, boxstyle="round,pad=0.15",
              facecolor='#e6f3ff', edgecolor='#336699', lw=2))
ax1.text(2, 8.6, 'PAINT/PANTHER Tree\n(PTHR12482)', ha='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')

# Two branches
ax1.annotate('', xy=(1.5, 7), xytext=(2, 8),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', lw=1.5, color='#336699'))
ax1.annotate('', xy=(3.5, 7), xytext=(2, 8),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', lw=1.5, color='#336699'))

# ROG1 branch - annotated with GO:0047372
ax1.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0, 5.8), 3, 1.2, boxstyle="round,pad=0.15",
              facecolor='#ffe6e6', edgecolor='red', lw=2))
ax1.text(1.5, 6.4, 'SF62 (ROG1 branch)\nPTN000773838', ha='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold')
ax1.text(1.5, 5.95, 'GO:0047372 ✓ (IDA+IBA)', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='red')

# LPL1 branch - NOT annotated with GO:0047372
ax1.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((3, 5.8), 3.2, 1.2, boxstyle="round,pad=0.15",
              facecolor='#e6ffe6', edgecolor='green', lw=2))
ax1.text(4.6, 6.4, 'SF24 (LPL1 branch)\nPTN000280739', ha='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold')
ax1.text(4.6, 5.95, 'GO:0004622 ✓ GO:0120559 ✓', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='green')

# QuickGO database
ax1.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0.3, 3.5), 3.5, 1.5, boxstyle="round,pad=0.15",
              facecolor='#fff3e6', edgecolor='#cc6600', lw=2))
ax1.text(2.05, 4.5, 'QuickGO/EBI\n(Authoritative)', ha='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')
ax1.text(2.05, 3.75, 'Q5AMS2: NO GO:0047372', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='red', fontweight='bold')

ax1.annotate('', xy=(2.05, 5), xytext=(2.05, 5.8),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', lw=1.5, color='#cc6600'))

# UniProt
ax1.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((4.5, 3.5), 3.5, 1.5, boxstyle="round,pad=0.15",
              facecolor='#f0e6ff', edgecolor='#6633cc', lw=2))
ax1.text(6.25, 4.5, 'UniProt\n(Derived)', ha='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')
ax1.text(6.25, 3.75, 'Q5AMS2: Shows GO:0047372', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='#6633cc')

ax1.annotate('', xy=(6.25, 5), xytext=(4.6, 5.8),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', lw=1.5, color='#6633cc', ls='--'))

# AI Review YAML (consumer)
ax1.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((2.5, 1.5), 4, 1.2, boxstyle="round,pad=0.15",
              facecolor='#ffffcc', edgecolor='#999900', lw=2))
ax1.text(4.5, 2.1, 'AI Review YAML\n(Seed Hypothesis)', ha='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')

ax1.annotate('stale?', xy=(4.5, 2.7), xytext=(6.25, 3.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', lw=1.5, color='#6633cc', ls='--'),
            fontsize=7, color='#6633cc', fontstyle='italic')

# Big X over the propagation
ax1.plot([5.5, 7], [6.5, 5.5], 'r-', lw=3, alpha=0.5)
ax1.plot([5.5, 7], [5.5, 6.5], 'r-', lw=3, alpha=0.5)
ax1.text(7.2, 6, 'NOT\npropagated', fontsize=8, color='red', fontweight='bold')

# ============================================================
# Panel B: Complete GO Decision Table
# ============================================================
ax2 = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, 1])
ax2.axis('off')
ax2.set_title('B. GO Annotation Decision Table', fontweight='bold', fontsize=11)

table_data = [
    ['GO Term', 'Label', 'QuickGO', 'UniProt', 'Action', 'Source node'],
    ['GO:0047372', 'MAG lipase', '✗ ABSENT', '✓ Present', 'REMOVE', 'N/A (stale)'],
    ['GO:0004622', 'PC lyso-PLA1', '✓ Present', '✓ Present', 'RETAIN', 'PTN000280739'],
    ['GO:0120559', 'PE lyso-PLA1', '✓ Present', '✗ Absent', 'RETAIN', 'PTN000280739'],
    ['GO:0005811', 'Lipid droplet', '✓ Present', '✓ Present', 'RETAIN', 'PTN000280739'],
    ['GO:0006629', 'Lipid metab.', '✓ Present', '✓ Present', 'RETAIN', 'PTN000280657'],
    ['GO:0005737', 'Cytoplasm', '✓ Present', '✗ Absent', 'RETAIN', 'PTN000967933'],
    ['GO:0016042', 'Lipid catabol.', '✗ Absent', '✓ Present', 'RETAIN*', 'IEA (UniProt)'],
]

colors = [
    ['#999999'] * 6,   # header
    ['#ffcccc'] * 6,   # MAG lipase - remove
    ['#ccffcc'] * 6,   # retain
    ['#ccffcc'] * 6,
    ['#ccffcc'] * 6,
    ['#ccffcc'] * 6,
    ['#ccffcc'] * 6,
    ['#ffffcc'] * 6,   # IEA - different pipeline
]

table = ax2.table(cellText=table_data, cellLoc='center', loc='center',
                  cellColours=colors)
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(7)
table.scale(1.1, 1.6)

for j in range(6):
    table[0, j].set_text_props(fontweight='bold', color='white')
    table[0, j].set_facecolor('#444444')
table[1, 4].set_text_props(fontweight='bold', color='red')

# ============================================================
# Panel C: Evidence Weight Summary
# ============================================================
ax3 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 0])
ax3.set_title('C. Evidence Weight Against GO:0047372', fontweight='bold', fontsize=11)

evidence_items = [
    'QuickGO: annotation absent',
    'Sc_LPL1: phospholipase B (IDA)',
    'PANTHER: different subfamily\n(SF24 vs SF62)',
    'Sequence: 44% id Sc_LPL1\nvs 26% id ROG1',
    'Active site: 3 key\nresidues divergent',
    'InterPro: lacks\nRog1_fam (IPR016445)',
    'CGD: no data (ND)',
]

weights = [5.0, 4.8, 4.5, 4.0, 3.8, 3.5, 2.0]
colors_bar = ['#cc0000', '#ff3333', '#ff6633', '#ff9933', '#ffcc33', '#ffcc66', '#999999']

y_pos = np.arange(len(evidence_items))
bars = ax3.barh(y_pos, weights, color=colors_bar, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5, height=0.7)
ax3.set_yticks(y_pos)
ax3.set_yticklabels(evidence_items, fontsize=8)
ax3.set_xlabel('Evidence Weight (1-5)', fontsize=9)
ax3.set_xlim(0, 5.5)
ax3.invert_yaxis()

for i, (bar, w) in enumerate(zip(bars, weights)):
    ax3.text(w + 0.1, i, f'{w:.1f}', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')

ax3.axvline(x=3, color='gray', ls='--', alpha=0.3)
ax3.text(3.1, len(evidence_items) - 0.3, 'threshold', fontsize=7, color='gray', fontstyle='italic')

# ============================================================
# Panel D: Final Verdict
# ============================================================
ax4 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 1])
ax4.axis('off')
ax4.set_title('D. Final Verdict & Curation Leads', fontweight='bold', fontsize=11)

verdict_text = """VERDICT: OVER-ANNOTATED
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

GO:0047372 (monoacylglycerol lipase activity)
on C. albicans LPL1 (Q5AMS2) is NOT supported.

The annotation:
 • Is ABSENT from QuickGO (authoritative source)
 • Was correctly restricted to ROG1 (SF62) by PAINT
 • Contradicts Sc_LPL1 characterization (PLB, IDA)
 • Shows active-site divergence from ROG1

CURATION LEADS:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
1. REMOVE GO:0047372 from review pipeline
   (likely stale UniProt sync artifact)

2. RETAIN GO:0004622, GO:0120559
   (phospholipase activities from PAINT)

3. Verify: seed YAML source — UniProt or GO?

KEY REFERENCES:
 PMID:25014274 — Sc_LPL1 = phospholipase B
 PMID:25433290 — Sc_ROG1 = MAG lipase
 PMID:28100635 — Sc_LPL1 in LD/proteasome
"""

ax4.text(0.05, 0.95, verdict_text, transform=ax4.transAxes, fontsize=8.5,
         verticalalignment='top', fontfamily='monospace',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#fff8f0', edgecolor='#cc6600', lw=2))

plt.savefig('final_provenance_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Final provenance summary figure saved")
